About Me

Hello! I'm a creative professional based in the Philippines. I specialize in animation, illustration, and digital art, bringing characters and stories to life frame by frame.

With years of experience in character design and motion graphics, I've worked on a range of projects from editorial illustrations to full animated shorts. I'm always looking for bold new challenges.
